content.description:
Synchronous pushState patching for tracking iframe navigation depth.

Hob functions are always async, but browsers reject async calls to `History.pushState` as insecure. This library provides a synchronous JS wrapper.

## Usage

```js
const tracker = require('iframe-nav-tracker');
const nav = tracker.patch(iframe);  // call in onload
nav.back();   // safe back — won't escape iframe
nav.depth();  // current depth
nav.reset();  // reset on reload
```
